title: すみれステークスの後に・息切れの理由

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite not feeling her best, Super Creek
achieves a great result. However...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Pant, huff, wheeze...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I'm fine, really... So please... There's no need to
look so worried... okay?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
It's nothing... But I'm... a bad Creek... for making...
you worry.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Urk!
choice_data_list: We're going to get you checked out!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After her emergency checkup, Super Creek is
prescribed bed rest.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After sleeping for a while...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Um, sorry for causing you so much trouble...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Yeah. As long as I rest up, I should be fine. But...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I feel like there's this strange heaviness inside my
body.

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text:
I looked into it but was unable to pinpoint the
cause.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
You don't know what's wrong? What does that
mean?

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text:
She has a light case of bad circulation, and it's
likely to reoccur.

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text: It's hard to pinpoint the cause, however.

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text:
There's still so much we don't know about
Umamusume physiology, and there aren't many
case studies for us to use as reference.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Goodness...
choice_data_list: Is there anything we can do, Doctor?

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text:
For now, just make sure not to push her too hard.
Without knowing the cause of her ailment, I'm
afraid we can't come up with a treatment plan.

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text: Tracking down the cause... is your job, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Since you're the one who observes her on a
daily basis, it's up to you to discern the cause of
her condition and attempt to neutralize it.

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text:
You'll also need to pay extra careful attention to
her race schedule for the time being.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: For the time being?

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text: Yes. To give you a rough estimate, I'd say...

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text: About half a year—until the fall.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Fall? No way... What about the Classics?

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text:
I wouldn't say it's out of the question, but
common sense would dictate that it's in your best
interest to forgo them.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I decide to let Super Creek rest in the infirmary
and make my way home.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I'm leaving, I suddenly sense a presence in the
courtyard. I turn to look...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Sob... You only get one chance... I wanted to win the Satsuki Sho and the Derby for you...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Three... I promised to win all three... Sniffle...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Waaahhh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She bursts into tears, bawling like a child. It
breaks my heart to know that there's little I can
do to comfort her...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Given the current situation, we shift our next goal
to the Kikuka Sho. Will I be able to... determine
the cause of her condition?
